channel.title: Benjamin Arfa - Blog & Insights
channel.description: Insights on healthcare interoperability, data engineering, regulatory technology, and digital consulting by Moadh Benjamin Arfa.
channel.copyright: © 2026 Arfa Digital Consulting. All rights reserved.

item.title: Building Healthcare Data Pipelines with FHIR
item.dc:creator: Moadh Benjamin Arfa
item.description: How HL7 FHIR transforms healthcare data pipelines, enabling true interoperability while respecting the complexity of clinical data models.

item.title: Why Open Standards Matter in RegTech
item.dc:creator: Moadh Benjamin Arfa
item.description: Why open standards like BIRD and SDMX are reshaping regulatory reporting and reducing the compliance burden for financial institutions.

item.title: From Data Engineering to Digital Consulting
item.dc:creator: Moadh Benjamin Arfa
item.description: Reflections on transitioning from hands-on data engineering to digital consulting, and the skills that bridge both worlds.
